title: The Fight Against Katakuri Begins
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Luffy, Unknown person #7, Katakuri, Unknown person #8 as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 23 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
